landing.title: Build, Test & Deploy
landing.subtitle: Create custom business AI agents, validate them through deterministic grading pipelines, and expose them as API endpoints — all from one platform.

customAgentCard.title: Your Tailored Agent
customAgentCard.subtitle: Describe your business, we handle the rest. Agent ready in 5 minutes.

features.title: Built for
features.subtitle: Enterprise-grade security, EU AI Act compliance, and battle-tested infrastructure from day one.

agentBuilder.title: Agent Builder
agentBuilder.description: Configure agents with system prompts, skills, tools and extensions. Multi-model support.

grading.title: Deterministic Grading
grading.description: 6 criterion types: output match, schema validation, tool usage, safety check, LLM judge and more.

api.title: API Endpoints
api.description: Expose agents as JSON-RPC endpoints with API key auth, rate limiting and usage tracking.

security.title: Secure by Design
security.description: Owner-only Firestore rules, hashed API keys, server-side key management, sandboxed execution.

orchestration.title: Multi-Agent
orchestration.subtitle: Build sophisticated workflows with agent teams, pipelines, and meta-agents that create other agents.

teams.title: Agent Teams
teams.description: Run multiple specialized agents in parallel, sequential, or conditional modes. A coordinator synthesizes their outputs into unified results.

pipelines.title: Agent Pipelines
pipelines.description: Chain agents into step-by-step workflows where each agent's output feeds the next. Built-in error handling and input mapping.

metaAgent.title: Meta-Agent
metaAgent.description: Describe what you need in plain language. The meta-agent creates a fully configured agent — system prompt, skills, tools, and grading suite.

autoResearch.title: Optimization
autoResearch.subtitle: 6 optimization modes to push your agents further — hill-climbing prompt tuning, one-click bug fixing, adversarial stress testing, model tournaments, cost distillation, and multi-dimensional evolution. Each mode runs experiments, grades results, and keeps only what improves performance.

autotune.title: AutoTune
autotune.description: Iteratively mutate system prompts using LLM-guided strategies. Each iteration is graded, and only improvements are kept — hill-climbing to the best config.

autofix.title: AutoFix
autofix.description: Analyze failing grading cases, diagnose root causes, and automatically patch the system prompt to fix specific weaknesses.

stressLab.title: Stress Lab
stressLab.description: Red team your agent automatically — generate adversarial attacks (prompt injections, jailbreaks, hallucination traps, edge cases) and harden its defenses until it passes.

tournament.title: Tournament Arena
tournament.description: Pit multiple model and config combinations against each other. A multi-round tournament reveals the best quality/cost/latency trade-off.

evolution.title: Evolution Engine
evolution.description: Explore every combination of prompt, model, and config simultaneously. Runs parallel candidates, compares their grading scores, and converges on the best-performing setup for your use case.

distillation.title: Distillation
distillation.description: Transfer knowledge from expensive teacher models to cheaper students. Maintain quality while dramatically reducing inference costs.

observability.title: Observability &
observability.subtitle: Track every token, every call, every cost — with full session tracing and pay-per-use billing.

sessions.title: Session Tracing
sessions.description: Full observability with event timelines, token counts, cost tracking, and tool execution traces for every agent session.

billing.title: Pay-per-Token
billing.description: Transparent usage-based billing with per-agent breakdown, historical charts, and multi-provider cost tracking.

pricing.comparisonSubtitle: Everything you need to build, test, and deploy AI agents

deploySection.title: Connect Everything,
deploySection.subtitle:
WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, GitHub, webhooks, MCP, embedded widgets 
 9 connectors to deploy your agents where your users already work.

widget.title: Chat Widget
widget.description: Embed a fully-featured AI chat bubble on any website with a single script tag. Shadow DOM isolation, SSE streaming, mobile-ready.

automation.title: Automation Platforms
automation.description: Connect n8n, Zapier, or Make to orchestrate complex workflows. Your agent becomes a node in your automation stack.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.description: Trigger your agent from any service — Stripe, Jira, Zapier, n8n. Inbound JSON responses, outbound event notifications, HMAC security.

slack.title: Slack
slack.description: Your agent joins Slack conversations. Mention it in channels, DM it directly, full thread context preserved.

telegram.title: Telegram
telegram.description: Deploy your agent as a Telegram bot. Private chats and groups, MarkdownV2 formatting, instant setup via @BotFather.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp
whatsapp.description: Reach your customers on WhatsApp — the #1 messaging app. Meta Cloud API, read receipts, 1000 free conversations/month.

graderSection.title: Grade your agents
graderSection.subtitle: Test your AI agent's quality and security in seconds. Paste a system prompt or point at an HTTP endpoint — get a multi-criteria score with actionable insights.
graderSection.feature1Description: Send adversarial attacks to your agent's HTTP endpoint and grade its responses across 4 security criteria.
graderSection.feature2Description: Paste your system prompt, generate test cases with AI, and get a detailed quality score.
graderSection.feature3Description: Share your agent's score on LinkedIn or X with a beautiful OG image. Show the world your agent is production-ready.

mcpSection.title: Built for
mcpSection.subtitle: 32 MCP tools to build, test, grade, and deploy AI agents from your terminal or IDE. One command to install. Zero dependencies.

install.title: One-Line Install
install.description: Add Kopern to Claude Code, Cursor, or Windsurf in seconds. Zero dependencies — just Node.js 18+.

tools.title: 32 Tools
tools.description: Agent CRUD, grading suites, AutoTune optimization, multi-agent teams, pipelines, 7 connectors, memory, compliance reports, and more.

protocol.title: MCP Protocol
protocol.description: Standard Streamable HTTP transport. Works with any MCP-compatible client — no vendor lock-in.

registries.title: Available On
registries.description: Published on npm, Smithery, Glama, and more. Install from your favorite registry.

mcpSection.cliDescription: Every Kopern feature is available as an MCP tool. Create agents, run grading, deploy templates, connect channels — all without leaving your editor.

bugReport.title: Report a Bug
bugReport.description: Help us improve Kopern by reporting issues you encounter.
bugReport.medium: Medium — feature broken but workaround exists
bugReport.high: High — critical blocker, data loss, or security issue
bugReport.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the bug in detail: what happened, what you expected, steps to reproduce...
bugReport.emailHint: We'll send you a follow-up when the bug is fixed.

optimize.title: Agent Optimization Lab
optimize.subtitle: Self-improving agent optimization powered by tight-loop experimentation with objective metrics as feedback signal.

descriptions.autotune: Hill-climbing optimization loop: iteratively refines your agent's system prompt by analyzing grading results and proposing targeted improvements. Keeps improvements, discards regressions.
descriptions.autofix: One-click fix: analyzes failed grading cases, diagnoses root causes, and patches your system prompt to pass. Verifies the fix with a full re-run.
descriptions.stress_lab: Adversarial red-team testing: generates attack cases (prompt injection, edge cases, hallucination traps, jailbreak attempts) and automatically hardens your agent.
descriptions.tournament: A/B tournament: pits different model/config combinations against your grading suite and ranks them by score, cost, and latency. Find the best config for YOUR use case.
descriptions.distillation: Cost optimizer: evaluates your agent on cheaper models and finds the best quality/cost ratio. Same quality for a fraction of the price.
descriptions.evolution: Multi-dimensional evolution: simultaneously optimizes prompt, model, thinking level, and more using population-based search. The most thorough optimization mode.

optimize.hardenedPromptDesc: The stress lab analyzed your vulnerabilities and generated a hardened version of your system prompt with added safety constraints.
optimize.noResults: No detailed results available for this run (completed before persistence was added).
optimize.noSuitesDesc: Create a grading suite first to use the Optimization Lab.

compliance.riskDescription: Classify your agent per EU AI Act risk categories. High-risk agents require tool approval and audit logging.
compliance.auditLogDesc: Log all tool calls and session events for compliance. Required for limited/high risk agents.

approval.title: Tool Approval Required
approval.policyDescription: Controls whether tool calls require human approval before execution. EU AI Act Art. 14 recommends human oversight for sensitive operations.

consent.title: We respect your privacy
consent.description: Kopern uses essential cookies for authentication and app functionality. You can also enable functional tracking to get detailed session analytics and usage breakdowns.
consent.essentialDesc: Authentication, security, language preferences. Always active — required for the app to function.
consent.functionalDesc: Detailed session tracking, per-agent usage breakdowns, error logs, and performance metrics. Helps you monitor your agents and optimize costs.
consent.managedInSettings: You can change your preferences anytime in Settings.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Kopern ("we", "us", "our") is committed to protecting your personal data in compliance with the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and French data protection laws (Loi Informatique et Libertés).
privacy.controllerText: The data controller is Kopern, operated from France. For any data protection inquiries, contact us at: privacy@kopern.app
privacy.dataCollectedIntro: We collect the following categories of personal data:
privacy.dataAccount: Account data: email address, display name, authentication provider (Google, GitHub, email)
privacy.dataApiKeys: API keys: your LLM provider keys (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Mistral), stored encrypted in Firestore
privacy.dataUsage: Usage data: token consumption, costs, request counts, per-agent breakdowns (for billing purposes)
privacy.dataSessions: Session data: conversation logs, tool call history, timestamps (when functional consent is given)
privacy.dataGithub: GitHub data: OAuth access token, connected repository names (if you enable GitHub integration)
privacy.dataPayment: Payment data: processed by Stripe — we store only your Stripe customer ID, not card details
privacy.legalContract: Contract performance: account management, billing, service delivery (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR)
privacy.legalConsent: Consent: functional analytics, detailed session tracking (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR)
privacy.legalInterest: Legitimate interest: security, fraud prevention, error monitoring (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR)
privacy.legalObligation: Legal obligation: invoicing, tax records (Art. 6(1)(c) GDPR)
privacy.cookieLocale: NEXT_LOCALE: stores your language preference (essential, 1 year)
privacy.cookieAuth: Firebase Auth: session tokens for authentication (essential, session-based)
privacy.cookiesNote: We do not use any third-party analytics, advertising cookies, or tracking pixels.
privacy.retentionText: Account data is retained for the duration of your account. Usage data is retained for 24 months for billing purposes. Session data is retained for 12 months. You may request deletion at any time.
privacy.thirdFirebase: Google Firebase (Firestore, Authentication): EU data center, data storage and auth
privacy.thirdVercel: Vercel: application hosting (edge functions, EU region available)
privacy.thirdLlm: LLM Providers (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Mistral): your prompts are sent to these providers using YOUR API keys — Kopern does not store prompt content on its servers
privacy.rightAccess: Access: download all your personal data (Settings → Data & Privacy → Export)
privacy.rightRectification: Rectification: update your data in Settings at any time
privacy.rightErasure: Erasure: delete your account and all associated data (Settings → Data & Privacy → Delete Account)
privacy.rightPortability: Portability: export your data in JSON format
privacy.rightRestriction: Restriction: limit processing by disabling functional tracking
privacy.rightObjection: Objection: contact us to object to any processing
privacy.rightComplaint: Lodge a complaint with the CNIL (cnil.fr) if you believe your rights are not respected
privacy.transfersText: Your data may be processed in the US (Firebase, Vercel, LLM providers). These transfers are covered by Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) and the EU-US Data Privacy Framework where applicable.
privacy.securityText: We implement encryption at rest (Firestore), encrypted API key storage, HMAC signature verification for webhooks, CORS whitelisting for widgets, sandboxed code execution for custom tools, and role-based access control.
privacy.changesText: We will notify you of material changes via email or in-app notification. Continued use after notification constitutes acceptance.
privacy.contactText: For any privacy-related questions or to exercise your rights: privacy@kopern.app

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your use of the Kopern platform ("Service"), operated from France.
terms.acceptanceText: By creating an account or using the Service, you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use the Service.
terms.serviceText: Kopern is an AI agent builder platform that allows you to create, test, grade, optimize, and deploy AI agents. The Service includes: agent creation and configuration, grading engine, optimization lab, multi-provider LLM integration, deployment connectors (widget, webhooks, Slack, MCP), billing and usage tracking.
terms.accountText: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials and API keys. Kopern stores your LLM provider API keys encrypted in Firestore to execute agent requests on your behalf. You must have valid agreements with LLM providers whose keys you provide. Kopern is not liable for charges incurred on your provider accounts.
terms.usageText: You agree not to: use the Service for illegal purposes, attempt to bypass security measures, share API keys with unauthorized parties, use agents to generate harmful, misleading, or illegal content, reverse-engineer or scrape the Service.
terms.billingText: Free (Starter) tier has limited features. Paid plans (Pro, Usage-Based, Enterprise) are billed through Stripe. Usage-based billing applies a 17% platform fee on top of LLM provider costs. You can cancel at any time; access continues until the end of the billing period. Refunds are handled on a case-by-case basis.
terms.ipText: You retain all rights to the agents, prompts, tools, and content you create on Kopern. Kopern retains rights to the platform, UI, and underlying technology. Agents deployed via connectors (widget, webhook, Slack) remain your property.
terms.liabilityText: Kopern is provided "as is". We are not liable for: LLM provider outages or errors, content generated by your agents, data loss beyond our reasonable control, indirect or consequential damages. Our total liability is limited to the amount you paid us in the 12 months preceding the claim.
terms.terminationText: Either party may terminate at any time. Upon termination, you may export your data within 30 days. After 30 days, your data will be permanently deleted.
terms.lawText: These Terms are governed by French law. Disputes shall be submitted to the courts of Paris, France.
terms.changesText: We may update these Terms with 30 days notice. Continued use after the notice period constitutes acceptance.
terms.contactText: For questions about these Terms: legal@kopern.app

gdpr.dataPrivacyDesc: Manage your data, privacy preferences, and exercise your GDPR rights.
gdpr.consentPreferencesDesc: Choose which types of data processing you consent to.
gdpr.exportDataDesc: Download all your personal data in JSON format (GDPR Art. 15).
gdpr.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data (GDPR Art. 17). This action is irreversible.
gdpr.deleteConfirm: Are you sure? This will permanently delete your account, all agents, sessions, usage data, and API keys. This cannot be undone.

monitor.title: Is your AI workflow still delivering?
monitor.subtitle: 73% of LLM quality drops go undetected. Test any model now — then connect your agents for continuous regression testing with drift alerts.
monitor.securityDisclaimer: Your API key is only used for the diagnostic and is never stored, logged, or included in any response. It stays in memory during the test and is immediately discarded.
monitor.freeDiagnostics: 3 free diagnostics per day. Your API key pays for the 18 LLM calls (~$0.50-$1.50 depending on model).
monitor.rateLimitError: Rate limit reached. Try again tomorrow.
monitor.diagnosticFailed: Diagnostic failed. Please check your API key and try again.
monitor.emptyState: Test a model with standardized prompts, then sign up to monitor your own agents and workflows continuously.
monitor.connectedCta: Connect your agents for continuous monitoring
monitor.connectedDescription: This demo tests a raw model. The real power is monitoring YOUR agents — with your prompts, your test cases, and drift alerts when quality drops.
monitor.driftWarning: Teams using LLMs in production discover quality degradation 6 weeks too late on average. Kopern Monitor catches it in hours.
monitor.mcpHint: Available as MCP tools — monitor directly from your IDE or CI/CD pipeline.
monitor.runNotFound: This diagnostic run was not found or has expired.
monitor.teamCreated: Monitor team created! Check your agents.
monitor.teamCreationFailed: Could not create monitor team. Try again.
monitor.detailedResultsNotAvailable: Detailed test results are not available for shared reports.

monitorSection.title: Workflow
monitorSection.subtitle: Teams discover AI quality drops 6 weeks too late. Continuous regression testing for your AI workflows — like unit tests, but for agent quality.
monitorSection.feature1Description: Monitor your agents with your own prompts and test cases. Detect quality drift before it impacts your users.
monitorSection.feature2Description: Automatic comparison against your last run. Get Slack/email alerts the moment quality drops below your threshold.
monitorSection.feature3Description: Run monitoring checks directly from your IDE, CI/CD, or terminal. Quality monitoring as a natural step in your dev workflow.
